entry.name: 추가 기획 내용
covered_facts: only task/subtask surfaces receive AI Agent assignment
admin/owner/public/private visibility controls read and mutation behavior
device and runtime operations stay account-owned while agents are workspace-scoped

direction_loop.top_down: Planning text becomes canonical only after it lands in ai-agent-policy and the API DSL.
direction_loop.bottom_up: If implementation finds that a planning sentence is ambiguous, resolve the policy wording before adding new generated operations.
